title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese recommends building four practical Claude projects to improve productivity rather than consuming tutorial content. He demonstrates an AI Board of Advisors, a domain-specific command center, an AI-optimized website, and an integrated operating system, emphasizing hands-on development over passive learning.
